hooks.command: if [ -n "$HANGARFIT_SKIP_PYTEST_HOOK" ]; then cat > /dev/null; exit 0; fi; path=$(python3 -c 'import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get("tool_input",{}).get("file_path",""))'); case "$path" in */src/hangarfit/*|*/tests/*) echo "[hangarfit hook] running pytest after edit of $path"; pytest -q --no-header 2>&1 | tail -30 ;; *) : ;; esac; exit 0
